caption: In a large hall with a blue carpeted stage and ornate ceiling lighting, several people practice martial arts. A central figure wears a white traditional uniform and holds a long staff, while others around them wear blue uniforms. In the initial sequence, the person in white swings the staff overhead as the blue-clad practitioners move around them in dynamic stances. As the scene progresses, the person in white shifts their weight and continues maneuvering the staff, while a practitioner in a black sleeveless shirt enters the frame from the right. Some participants engage in coordinated movements, stepping forward and backward across the stage. In the background, a seated audience watches the demonstration from the edge of the platform. The action transitions from wide, sweeping movements with the staff to more focused, grounded postures as the group shifts positions across the stage.
